response.justification: Strong senior engineer with relevant geospatial/GIS experience (GISCollective, Green Map) and distributed systems exposure (Sociomantic, millions of HTTP req/sec), but the core C++ requirement is a significant gap — only ~6 months of C/C++ at National Instruments roughly 10 years ago, with no recent commercial C++ or Rust work. Primary stack has been TypeScript/Node.js/DLang. Could be worth a screening call given the GIS domain fit and proven senior craftsmanship, but likely not a match unless the team accepts substantial ramp-up time on modern C++.
strengths: Hands-on geospatial/GIS platform experience with GISCollective and Open Green Map
Senior-level track record at Stripe, Shopify, and high-throughput systems at Sociomantic
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools, Linux server applications
concerns: C++ experience is minimal and dated (~6 months in 2014–2015); no recent commercial C++
No Rust experience listed as an acceptable alternative
No direct routing/navigation or map tiling pipeline experience
